message:
🐛 Fix opentofu-1033 mission and restore keycloak-17432 mission (#881)

- Fix opentofu-1033 (for_each import block): Replace kubectl/helm with
  tofu CLI commands, fix prerequisites to require tofu instead of
  kubernetes/kubectl, fix code block language tags
- Restore keycloak-17432 (SMTP OAuth): Revert accidental modification
  that incorrectly applied OpenTofu fixes to this keycloak mission file

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -11,20 +11,20 @@
     "status": "completed",
     "steps": [
       {
-        "title": "Check current opentofu deployment",
-        "description": "Verify your opentofu version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n opentofu -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentofu
helm list -n opentofu 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working opentofu installation."
+        "title": "Check OpenTofu installation",
+        "description": "Verify your OpenTofu version:
```bash
tofu version
```
This feature requires OpenTofu installed locally. Install via `brew install opentofu` or download from https://opentofu.org/docs/intro/install/."
       },
       {
-        "title": "Review opentofu configuration",
-        "description": "Inspect the relevant opentofu configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n opentofu -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentofu
kubectl get configmap -n opentofu -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=opentofu
```
### OpenTofu Version

```shell
1.6.0-dev
```

### Use Cases

The `import` block could benefit greatly from supporting `for_each`. 

Currently, importing resources that are using `for_each` is not possible / hard using the `import` block for them."
+        "title": "Understand the feature context",
+        "description": "### Use Cases

The `import` block could benefit greatly from supporting `for_each`. 

Currently, importing resources that are using `for_each` is not possible / hard using the `import` block for them."
       },
       {
         "title": "Apply the fix for Add support for `for_each` in the `import` block",
-        "description": "Related to https://github.com/opentofu/opentofu/issues/1033

Current plan for implementing `for_each` for the `import` block:
1. Prepare `ImportTarget` types and codebase for more dynamic addresses (addresses that are not fully known from the get-go) **<--- You are here**
2. Allow for having a more
```yaml
import {
  for_each = local.bucket_ids
  id = each.value.id
  to = aws_s3_bucket.bucket[each.value.key]
}

resource "aws_s3_bucket" "bucket" {
  for_each = local.bucket_ids
  ...
}
```"
+        "description": "Related to https://github.com/opentofu/opentofu/issues/1033

Current plan for implementing `for_each` for the `import` block:
1. Prepare `ImportTarget` types and codebase for more dynamic addresses (addresses that are not fully known from the get-go) **<--- You are here**
2. Allow for having a more
```hcl
import {
  for_each = local.bucket_ids
  id = each.value.id
  to = aws_s3_bucket.bucket[each.value.key]
}

resource "aws_s3_bucket" "bucket" {
  for_each = local.bucket_ids
  ...
}
```"
       },
       {
         "title": "Verify the feature works",
-        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n opentofu -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentofu
kubectl get events -n opentofu --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Add support for `for_each` in the `import` block" is functioning correctly."
+        "description": "Test that the feature is working as expected:
```bash
tofu version
tofu validate
tofu plan
```
Confirm that the feature described in "Add support for `for_each` in the `import` block" is functioning correctly."
       }
     ],
     "resolution": {
@@ -60,11 +60,10 @@
     "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
   },
   "prerequisites": {
-    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
     "tools": [
-      "kubectl"
+      "tofu"
     ],
-    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with opentofu installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+    "description": "OpenTofu CLI installed (brew install opentofu or download from opentofu.org). Terraform provider credentials as needed for the specific configuration."
   },
